message:
Welcome to The Big Investor, it is time to meet the team.

 *Access game links by pressing the Uptime Labs Logo in the top right of the screen*
 *Use `/incident` to create an incident record*

Once you're ready just click start to begin
Everyone, listen up, I just got off the phone with our biggest investor, Melon Tusk. He told me he was just trying to buy a Candle Holder for his grandma but the website wouldn't let him buy it.
Melon is really nervous because he heard about our outage earlier in the week.
Please tell me it's a problem with his computer and not a problem with our website.
Ok everyone, you know what to do. @ellie.walsh-options-it.com let's size up the issue.
I hope it's not payments again. I fear it is.
Oh my knees! Not again. Get this back up fast or we are toast!
keep me updated in the Business Comms channel
Is Melon the only one with this issue?
I tested and got the following error:
:star: Reproduces the incident
Melon's on the phone asking to join the incident bridge.
I told him it's not worth it and you have it under control under control. Don't let me down!
can you all test and see if you see the same
@ellie.walsh-options-it.com Tusk is very invested in this issue since he was involved in the incident so he's going to want constant updates
Sure thing
issue seems to be with all items when adding the the cart
:star: Qualify the problem
I was able to reproduce following your instructions
hi @shay have any changes been made to the cart service
:star: Check changes done to the platform
Here's the detailed info on each of the changes made today
can you send me all the changes made
Hope this helps:https://uptime-labs.atlassian.net/wiki/external/MGRkNTY2NDk3Yjg2NGI0MGJiMjI3ZmU3MTkzMWE5ZmQ
thank you!
@bob have any other customers reported this issue and if so when did they report it?
:star: Asking questions to validate impact of the problem
Give me a moment and i will check the reports....
no orders been placed
Phones are blowing up over here. I'm seeing tons of complaints that customers can't check out.
*Incident Number INC10008:* unable to add items to cart sev-1
:star: Incident record created
Tusk says he might not invest in the next round, depending on how we handle this outage.
It's weird people can browse, even add stuff to their cart, but when they click 'Add to Cart' it crashes with a 500 Internal Error.
I will need constant updates on the progress of the incident so he can see how well we handle these high-severity incidents
Some customers are saying they tried three times and gave up.
investigating with the team now and reviewing any changes that were made
:star: Reviewed changes
@shay are you able to rollback Change ID: CHG89359 to test if that is the issue
:star: Restoration over root cause analysis
:bulb: Be clear about what the issue is when communicating with stakeholders
@tanya would you have any insight into what the issue could be?
I feel like jumping to a rollback is a bit hasty, we don't even know what service is being impacted
Just online now, I'll need to investigate and see what services might be down to possibly form a theory
As of right now it doesn't look like we've started investigating yet
it appears to be checkout service
but when i click the cart it doesnt show me the cart
can I get everyones input into possible causes of this issue
users are unable to use the website
Shay and I will both take a look at the logs for you.
Checking now
thank you
do we have any third parties that manage anything related to this?
I'm seeing errors here

```
WARN  [shipping-service] High memory usage detected: 85%

ERROR [shipping-service] Failed to process shipment request shipmentId=SH12345

java.lang.OutOfMemoryError: Java heap space at com.shipping.service.ShipmentProcessor.process(ShipmentProcessor.java:78) at com.shipping.service.api.ShipmentController.createShipment(ShipmentController.java:34)

ERROR [shipping-service] Error sending message to queue: shipping-events

ERROR [shipping-service] Server responded with 503 Service Unavailable for API call /inventory/check
```
@Daniel are you seeing this?
the team are checking the logs
I'm seeing them errors in those services as well, not sure whats going on
What are we looking at now with this investigation
I've read the chat and reproduced the issue.
I'm currently looking into it from the platform side to gather more details.
i can see high memory is there a way we can free up space
Shipping pods seem to be crashing multiple times, and any time they bring themselves back up, they crash again.
What could be causing this???

```
WARN  [shipping-service] CPU load spiked to 106% for more than 2 minutes

ERROR [shipping-service] Unhandled exception in request handler

java.net.SocketTimeoutException: Read timed out

ERROR [shipping-service] Disk write failed: /var/log/shipping-service.log

java.io.IOException: No space left on device

INFO  [shipping-service] Service degraded
```
Hm I could try that
we need to lower cpu
can we can everyone taking a look at this, please provide any ideas you may have
Do you want me still rollback my change to payments?
can you please roll back just to rule it out please
CPU loads seemed to have spiked
:star: Use metrics as evidence
I will get started on the rollback for the Payment service now
will provide further updates in 5 mins
:star: Track actions and time box them
thank you
@tanya can you take 5 mins to take a look at anything you could test to reduce the load
Payment Service rollback is complete. How does the site look now?
@shay error still showing
Ensure all parties involved are on the same page in the investigation, use grounding techniques to achieve this
We need to get the site up and running please can we work as a time
team
@hamed have you any ideas
I see the issue on the site. Let me check the platform logs
What Tanya said about the pods crashing multiple times seems important, give me a minute.
thank you
I took a look at the logs and saw '500-SHIPPING-INTERNAL-ERROR'
if you are able to try and free up space
The servers stats are peaking with cpu, memory. Are we running any scripts that may cause this issue?
@ellie.walsh-options-it.com have you checked for this
Can we please check for any scripts running
checking to see if any scripts are running that are causing this issue
I have checked the pod's activity history and see that Logrotate automatically cleared cache 2 hours ago.
There were no other tests that I can see on the pod's activity history file.
I ran some Chaos tests in UAT 20 mins ago, this should have no impact on the Prod environment. I didn't track this as it has no impact on the Prod environment.
Have we identified the cause of this issue yet?
@tanya can you check for any scripts running
@daniel the tests may have caused this can you please check
I will check the Chaos tests
thank you!
This is not good @ellie.walsh-options-it.com
Looks like the chaos tests hit Prod because the UAT server names were hardcoded, and these servers got flipped to Prod
Yes due to upgradation of servers we have flipped them yesterday, apologies i didnt inform everyone about it
can we please stop the tests
What does this script do?
Chaos test creates problems to push systems to their limits, helping find weaknesses and see how they handle stress
Looks like the chaos tests running hit Prod because the UAT server names were hardcoded, and these servers got flipped to Prod
Stopping Chaos tests now...
can we please stop the tests
thanks daniel
Stopping the tests now
Thats the Chaos test stopped, hopefully we shouldn't see any more issues with the platform now
@ellie.walsh-options-it.com can we confirm this please I dont want this wrapped up until we know it is resolved
i tested and still getting the erros
can everyone else test
:star: Cross checking resolution with team
tested again and seems to be up
:star: Validate the fix
checking now...
I'm not getting any errors
Same here!
there is still errors for certain items
appears to be good
I refreshed a few times and it did the trick, it's probably taking a few moments for the infra to revcover
Stopping the tests has fixed the issue
:star: Confirm resolution with the business
website is back up and running
Orders been placed again
Phew! That was a wild one, @Daniel in the future make sure you are sure the tests are running only in UAT, and you make it known they are running.
I will Sync with Daniel on how to configure the tests to run as intended and go over how to track them.
thanks team for aoll the good work
I'll be making the fix and not hardcoding the servers in the scripts
Sounds good, I will be more careful in the future, sorry guys.
thanks daniel!
